articles.title: NParks employee among group being investigated over handling of snake during Mandai night walk
articles.content: An online post has alleged that snakes were handled poorly during a photography-focused night walk in Mandai. The snake was also reportedly in the process of shedding during the incident. According to the poster, another smaller snake was also allegedly handled and passed among participants for taking photos. The poster added that they were concerned about the potential stress caused to the reptiles, citing prolonged handling and repeated interference during shedding. Responding to queries from AsiaOne, Jessica Kwok, NParks' group director of enforcement and...
